headline: Is Bank of America’s Upgrade Reframing ON Semiconductor’s (ON) AI Power Strategy or Just the Buyback?
summary: Recently, ON Semiconductor (onsemi) was upgraded by Bank of America, which highlighted the company’s evolving product mix, expanding AI power solutions pipeline, new Treo platform and a multi-billion-dollar share buyback program, despite prior sales declines and softer demand conditions. This shift in analyst commentary contrasts with the company’s weaker recent operational trends, signaling growing attention on how product innovation and capital returns could reshape its longer-term...

headline: Shares of semiconductors companies are trading higher amid overall market strength after Iran announced the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz for the remainder of the ceasefire on the heels of a 10-day armistice between Israel and Lebanon. This alleviates the ongoing supply disruption and lessens energy costs.

headline: AMD, Oracle, Microsoft and the IGV lead a monster week for tech stocks
summary: Oracle, AMD and Microsoft are on pace for historic weeks, while Intel, Broadcom, Micron, Marvell and ON Semiconductor are all roaring in April.

headline: ON Semiconductor Corp. (ON) Moves 10.4% Higher: Will This Strength Last?
summary: ON Semiconductor Corp. (ON) saw its shares surge in the last session with trading volume being higher than average. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions could translate into further price increase in the near term.

headline: Himax and onsemi Stocks Trade Up, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after industry bellwether Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. (TSMC) reported a substantial 58% jump in quarterly profit and forecasted strong future sales, fueled by booming demand for artificial intelligence (AI).
